channel.title: Plakias on Villa de Tara
channel.description: Recent content in Plakias on Villa de Tara

item.title: Off to the South
item.description: Having visited Dive2gether for a look around back in April, we booked a couple of boat dives last week when we were in Plakias for a beach-day with visiting relatives. As we were going to be using our own equipment, they advised us they would want to test our BCDs and regulators. We arrived yesterday morning at 08:30 and met our guides for the day, Linda (who is part of the Marine Biology Research team) and Electra (who is currently on their Bootcamp programme).

item.title: Dive2gether
item.description: Dive2gether in Plakias is a PADI 5* Instructor Development Center. They offer a variety of recreational activities including shore diving, boat diving, snorkelling, night snorkelling/diving and a weekly BBQ. The format for the day’s activities was much as you might expect: Meet at the Dive Center for introductions, kit checks and packing Travel to the port (for boat dives) or beach (for shore dives) Arrive at the dive site. Briefing for the dive.
